title: Account Settings
subtitle: This area manages account options and experience preferences.

change_password.meta_description: Securely update your DaNangTrip account password.
change_password.heading: Change Password
change_password.description: Keep your account safe with a strong and unique password.
change_password.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again later.

delete_account.heading: Delete Account
delete_account.subtitle: This action cannot be undone
delete_account.warning_1: All personal data will be permanently deleted
delete_account.warning_2: Booking history and ratings will be deleted
delete_account.warning_4: You will not be able to recover this account
delete_account.active_bookings_warning: You have active bookings. Please cancel or complete them before deleting your account.
delete_account.confirm_checkbox_label: I understand that deleting my account is permanent and cannot be undone.
delete_account.modal_body_1: Your account will be permanently deleted.
delete_account.success_toast: Your account has been deleted successfully.
delete_account.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again later.
